expectations.evidence: No mutation of cart or items. Returns new ShippingResult object. All interfaces use `readonly`.
Constants extracted: WEIGHT_TIERS, DEFAULT_SHIPPING=5, COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS, DEFAULT_COUNTRY_MULTIPLIER=2.5, FREE_SHIPPING_COUPONS.
`any` removed. Explicit interfaces: CartItem, Cart, ShippingResult.
Rates externalized as WEIGHT_TIERS and COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS at module level.
No input validation on weight, country, or couponCode. No guards for negative weight or empty items.
